import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

def process_sales(df):
    df["total"] = df["quantity"] * df["unit_price"]
    df["tax"] = df["total"] * 0.08
    df["discount_pct"] = np.where(df["total"] > 100, 0.1, 0.0)
    df["final"] = df["total"] - df["total"] * df["discount_pct"]
    return df

def categorize_age(df):
    df["age_group"] = np.select(
        [df["age"] >= 65, df["age"] >= 18],
        ["senior", "adult"],
        default="minor",
    )
    return df
